mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly lifting equity valuations over the next twenty trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending, driving negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 65 percent of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized strength across consumer discretionary and fixed investment channels, generating positive forward equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a p-value greater than 0.10 or produces negative returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which translates into positive short-term equity returns during periods of stable inflation.
failure_condition: The signal loses predictive accuracy when annual CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3 percent.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 235.0, elevated inflation expectations trigger anticipated monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in more than 60 percent of observations above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, supporting corporate revenue growth and positive equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: The interaction effect is statistically insignificant or yields negative returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate earnings trajectories, generating positive equity returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production exceeding 1.0 percent signals an abrupt supply-side contraction and weakening business activity, triggering negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in more than 55 percent of triggered instances.
